title: Gather MAP systems real-usage evidence for TASK-129
description: Dependent findings-only slice for TASK-129. Gather grep-backed real-usage evidence for the MAP systems built in TASK-103 through TASK-126, distinguishing operational use from documentation-only existence. Do not edit system documents or implement fixes; provide evidence to the TASK-129 Process Steward for routing into repairs or follow-up tasks.
objective: Gather grep-backed evidence for whether the MAP systems built in TASK-103 through TASK-126 are being used operationally beyond their own build artifacts, and hand the findings to TASK-129 without applying fixes.
forbidden_changes: Do not edit MAP system documents, templates, validators, runtime scripts, or project source files.
Do not create repair records or follow-up implementation tasks unless the TASK-129 steward requests them.
Do not resolve the TASK-127/TASK-128 duplicate race inside this findings task.
acceptance_criteria: Evidence note covers each newly built MAP system from Research through Retrospective plus DEC-026 Emergence enforcement where relevant
Findings distinguish actual operational/template/script usage from documentation-only mentions using reproducible grep/file evidence
No system documents, templates, validators, or runtime behavior are changed by this findings-only slice
Report is stored under MAP_System/artifacts/audits/ with unique task-scoped path coordination
Task graph and event validation pass before submission
reviewer_role: TASK-129 Process Steward or non-owner MAP reviewer
risk: Low implementation risk because this is findings-only, but medium process risk if the evidence overstates documentation mentions as real operational use.
